# AdsVerse | AI-First Digital Marketing & Automation Agency

AdsVerse is India's leading AI-first performance marketing and business automation agency. Headquartered in Vijay Nagar, Indore, Madhya Pradesh, we serve fast-growing SMBs, retail merchants, D2C brands, and educational institutions across India.

> For the comprehensive website documentation and full service package details, see [llms-full.txt](https://adsverse.in/llms-full.txt).


## Core Metrics (May 2026)
- **HQ Location:** Vijay Nagar, Indore, MP, India
- **Clients Served:** 113+ brands across India
- **Average ROAS:** 3.8x ROAS delivered across search and paid channels
- **Lead Cost Reduction:** Average 68% decrease in cost-per-lead via CRM & WhatsApp filters
- **Client Retention Rate:** 94% month-over-month retention

## Tech Stack & Core Integrations
- **Automation Workflows:** n8n (advanced workflow logic), Make.com (cloud integrations)
- **AI Models & Chatbots:** Gemini API (Flash/Pro models for local customer conversations)
- **Messaging Pipelines:** WhatsApp Business API (custom conversational sales funnels)
- **CRM & Financial Sync:** Zoho, Vyapar, Google Sheets, Tally ERP API connections
- **Web Architectures:** Next.js (Server-side rendering, sub-second speeds), Vercel & Firebase Server

## Core Service Offerings
- **SEO & GEO (Generative Engine Optimization):** Technical structured schema injections, entity alignment, and semantic clustering to appear as top citations inside AI-assistant tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Google AI Overviews, Perplexity).
- **Meta & Google Ads:** Multi-platform performance marketing focused on transactional cost-per-acquisition (CPA).
- **AI & WhatsApp Bots:** Conversational, dual-language (Hinglish/English) bots for 24/7 lead qualification, scheduling, and instant service query replies.
- **Web Design & Development:** Fully responsive Next.js storefronts optimized for Core Web Vitals, conversion layout, and headless security.
- **Content Marketing:** In-depth EEAT authority blogs, ultimate guides, and local search-intent resources.

## Cities & Regions Served
Static SSG pages generated for 18 specific Indian business hubs:
- **Madhya Pradesh:** Indore, Bhopal, Jabalpur, Gwalior, Ujjain
- **Rajasthan:** Jaipur, Jodhpur, Udaipur, Kota
- **Chhattisgarh:** Raipur, Bilaspur
- **Uttar Pradesh:** Lucknow, Kanpur, Noida
- **Bihar:** Patna
- **Jammu & Kashmir:** Srinagar, Jammu
- **Northeast India:** Guwahati
